title: Spicy Peruvian Chicken Stew
description: A hearty, flavorful stew originating from Peru, featuring spicy chicken thighs in a creamy sauce. Serve with rice or crusty bread for a satisfying meal.

ingredients.name: Spicy stew seasoning
ingredients.notes: such as aji amarillo or similar

ingredients.name: Creamy sauce
ingredients.notes: such as aji de gallina sauce

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken thighs and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the pot and set aside.
Add the chopped onion to the pot and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the spicy stew seasoning and cook for 1 minute.
Add the diced tomatoes and stir to combine.
Return the chicken to the pot and pour in the creamy sauce.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook until the chicken is cooked through, about 20-25 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
